creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The change of the Bay area area code from (415) to (510) is now 
reflected in the fortunes database.  We thank you for you assistance 
in keeping the fortunes database up-to-date with modern events 
and happenings.  We value your input on all apects of the FreeBSD 
system, and this database is not the least of those! 

Thanks!
